# Official Learning Path

> Generated from official Motion URLs by `pnpm motion-docs:refresh`.

Use this reference when the agent needs direct access to the official Motion docs, current API pages, tutorials, examples, or the optional AI kit/MCP workflow.

## Core Rule

Use the official Motion pages for freshness and canon.

Use the local opinionated guide for defaults, taste, and preferred subsets.

## Foundation

Use these first when the agent needs the canonical docs, latest install guidance, or a clean official starting point.

### [Get started with Motion — install, first animation | Motion](https://motion.dev/docs/quick-start)

- Why load: Start here for a broad official orientation before diving into React-specific pages.
- Official summary: Learn Motion animation library: Install, animate HTML/SVG/WebGL elements with spring animations, staggering effects. Complete guide with examples.

### [Motion for React: Get started - React Animation Library | Motion](https://motion.dev/docs/react)

- Why load: Canonical React entrypoint for Motion concepts, install flow, and feature overview.
- Official summary: Build smooth 120fps React animations with Motion. Install in seconds, then master spring, gesture, scroll & layout animations. Start with our guide.

### [How to install Motion for React | Motion](https://motion.dev/docs/react-installation)

- Why load: Use when package setup, framework integration, or latest install guidance matters.
- Official summary: Your complete guide to installing Motion for React. Learn how to set up the animation library in any project using npm, Yarn, or pnpm, with specific guides for Next.js and Vite.

## Core API Pages

Use these when implementation questions need the official API surface rather than a fork-local summary.

### [React motion component | Motion](https://motion.dev/docs/react-motion-component)

- Why load: Primary reference for the motion component and the props most teams use first.
- Official summary: The motion component supercharges every HTML and SVG element for 120fps React animations and gestures. Learn the API, props, and performance tips.

### [AnimatePresence — React exit animations | Motion](https://motion.dev/docs/react-animate-presence)

- Why load: Canonical reference for exit animations and conditional rendering.
- Official summary: Enable effortless exit animations in React with AnimatePresence. It animates components on removal via the exit prop.

### [Layout Animation — React FLIP & Shared Element | Motion](https://motion.dev/docs/react-layout-animations)

- Why load: Use for shared-element transitions, layout changes, and FLIP-style motion.
- Official summary: Animate layout changes in React with Motion. Auto layout transitions, FLIP, shared-element animations via layoutId, and performance tips (with code).

### [useScroll — React scroll-linked animations | Motion](https://motion.dev/docs/react-use-scroll)

- Why load: Use for scroll-linked animations, progress indicators, and parallax.
- Official summary: Create scroll-linked animations like progress bars & parallax with Motion for React

### [React gesture animations — hover, drag, press | Motion](https://motion.dev/docs/react-gestures)

- Why load: Use for hover, press, focus, drag, and gesture-driven interactions.
- Official summary: Power your UI with Motion for React

### [Create accessible animations in React — Guide | Motion](https://motion.dev/docs/react-accessibility)

- Why load: Canonical page for reduced-motion handling and accessible animation behavior.
- Official summary: Learn how to create accessible animations with Motion for React by respecting users

## Learning Surfaces

Use these when the user wants worked examples, tutorials, or broader exploration.

### [React animation tutorials | Motion](https://motion.dev/tutorials)

- Why load: Best official tutorial hub when the user wants a worked learning path instead of only API docs.
- Official summary: Explore the official library of Motion (prev Framer Motion) tutorials for React, JavaScript, and Vue. Learn step-by-step from the creator of Motion and master web animation.

### [Official Motion Examples | React, JS & Vue Animations](https://motion.dev/examples?platform=react)

- Why load: Best official source for concrete examples and pattern comparison.
- Official summary: 330+ examples for Motion (formerly Framer Motion). Full source code for React, JS, and Vue animations.

## Optional AI Path

Use this only when the user already has access to Motion's AI kit or MCP workflow.

### [Motion AI Kit - AI animation tools for Claude, Cursor | Motion](https://motion.dev/docs/ai-kit)

- Why load: Optional Motion AI kit and MCP workflow when the user already has access to that ecosystem.
- Official summary: The Motion+ AI Kit adds skills and tools to improve your LLM
